title: Mildly Tender Filipino French Lentils Bowl
description: Funky, tender, kid-friendly Filipino dish featuring French lentils, brine-wet, and FODMAP-friendly. This vibrant bowl is a twist on traditional Filipino flavors, with a focus on gentle spices and tender lentils.

ingredients.name: Canned coconut milk
ingredients.notes: full-fat or low-fat work equally well

instructions: In a medium saucepan, rinse the lentils and drain well.
Add 4 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to a simmer and cook the lentils for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
While the lentils cook, heat the coconut milk in a separate saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion, minced garlic, and grated ginger to the coconut milk and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the chopped cilantro, soy sauce, rice vinegar, salt, and black pepper to the saucepan and stir to combine.
If using, add the green chilies and patis (Filipino fish sauce) to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Once the lentils are cooked, drain and return them to the saucepan.
Add the coconut milk mixture to the lentils and stir to combine.
Serve the Mildly Tender Filipino French Lentils Bowl hot, garnished with additional chopped cilantro if desired.
